title: Frontend Developer
description: We are looking for a skilled Frontend Developer to join our product team. You will build responsive web applications using React and TypeScript, collaborate with designers, and ensure cross-browser compatibility. Experience with REST APIs and performance optimisation is a plus.

title: Backend Engineer (Node.js)
description: Join Freshworks as a Backend Engineer. You will design scalable microservices, work with PostgreSQL and Redis, write clean Node.js code, and contribute to API design. Strong understanding of distributed systems and CI/CD pipelines required.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Chargebee is hiring a Full Stack Developer to build features across our subscription billing platform. Stack includes React, Ruby on Rails, and MySQL. You'll work in agile sprints and own features end-to-end from design to deployment.

title: Data Analyst
description: Infosys BPM is seeking a Data Analyst to support business intelligence initiatives. You will query large datasets using SQL, create dashboards in Power BI or Tableau, and communicate insights to business stakeholders. Python scripting experience is preferred.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Razorpay is hiring a DevOps Engineer to manage our cloud infrastructure on AWS. You will automate deployments with Terraform and Ansible, maintain Kubernetes clusters, implement monitoring with Prometheus/Grafana, and support on-call rotations.

title: Product Manager
description: CRED is looking for a Product Manager to drive product strategy for our rewards platform. You will define roadmaps, write PRDs, run A/B experiments, and work closely with engineering, design, and data teams. 3+ years of PM experience required.

title: React Native Developer
description: PhonePe is hiring a React Native Developer to build and maintain our mobile payments app. You should have strong experience with React Native, iOS/Android deployment, state management (Redux), and performance profiling.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Swiggy's ML platform team is looking for an ML Engineer to build recommendation and ETA prediction models. You will work with large-scale data pipelines, train and deploy models using Python and TensorFlow/PyTorch, and run experiments in production.

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Ola Electric is looking for a UI/UX Designer to craft intuitive experiences for our mobile and web platforms. You will create wireframes, prototypes, and design systems in Figma, conduct user research, and collaborate with the product team.

title: Cloud Solutions Architect
description: Wipro is seeking a Cloud Solutions Architect to design and implement enterprise cloud solutions on Azure or AWS. You will consult with clients, draft architecture blueprints, lead migrations, and mentor junior engineers. Azure/AWS certifications preferred.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: HCL Technologies is hiring a Cybersecurity Analyst for our SOC team. Responsibilities include monitoring security events, investigating incidents, vulnerability assessment, and working with SIEM tools. CEH or CISSP certification is a plus.

title: Technical Content Writer
description: GeeksforGeeks needs a Technical Content Writer to create tutorials, explainers, and interview prep content covering DSA, system design, and web development. Strong programming background required; prior content writing experience preferred.
